channel.title: releases on Drupal WxT
channel.description: Recent content in releases on Drupal WxT

item.title: Releases
item.description: Release Created Date Description 3.0.14 2020-10-07T11:43:14Z Security updates: Update Drupal Core to 8.8.10 SA-core-2020-007 SA-core-2020-008 SA-core-2020-009 SA-core-2020-010 SA-core-2020-011 Updates for WxT Library Updates to WET-BOEW Library v4.0.38 Updates for WxT Bootstrap Add missing aria-label Link Canada Logo Search Box handling Article Role and About Features/Updates: Update Lightning 4.1.7 Upgrade path:
